label: About
title: About A varied saved-signal field selected by source quality, renderability, recency, and channel balance.
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 17 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around THE MINI FOREST - Rewilding using the Miyawaki Method and Join the Less Lawn More Life Challenge, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became A varied saved-signal field selected by source quality, renderability, recency, and channel balance.: A full-bleed artwork for 2026-05-03 derived from the current research field. The model autoresearch pass failed, so the runner fell back to deterministic channel-balanced source ranking. After the image was made, the mask pass used geometry and contour candidates to attach source windows to the visible marks.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
